description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa upholstered in a smooth, brown leather or leather-like material. The sofa features two large, loose back cushions and a single, tufted seat cushion that spans the entire seating area, providing a uniform and plush appearance. Cylindrical bolster pillows are positioned at each end, resting against the straight, padded armrests that are level with the backrest. The sofa sits on four short, dark wooden or metal legs, slightly recessed under the frame, giving it a floating look. The overall design is boxy and streamlined, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements, making it suitable for contemporary urban environments. The upholstery appears to be tightly fitted, with subtle stitching details visible along the edges and seat.
description: A modern brown leather sofa with two large back cushions, a single tufted seat, and cylindrical bolster pillows at each end. It features straight padded armrests and short, recessed legs for a sleek, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two large back cushions, single tufted seat, and both cylindrical bolster pillows with straight armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's boxy profile, the thickness of the armrest, and the cylindrical bolster pillow at one end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, flat backrest and the clean, unadorned back panel of the sofa.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the armrest and bolster pillow from the other end.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose back cushions and a single, long tufted seat cushion; two cylindrical bolster pillows at each end; all cushions are uniform in size and appear unattached.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests at each end, level with the backrest, with a boxy profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, dark legs, likely wood or metal, positioned at the corners and slightly recessed under the frame; legs are blocky and unobtrusive.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two large, loose cushions; continuous and unsegmented structure.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid brown upholstery with a smooth finish and subtle tufting on the seat; minimal visible stitching and no decorative patterns.
